sentences.arabic: رَكِبْتُ الْقِطَارَ مِنَ الْقَاهِرَةِ إِلَى الْأَقْصُرِ صَبَاحَ الثُّلَاثَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ukrcao sam se na voz iz Kaira za Luksor u utorak ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: I boarded the train from Cairo to Luxor on Tuesday morning.

sentences.arabic: الرِّحْلَةُ تَسْتَغْرِقُ نَحْوَ تِسْعِ سَاعَاتٍ وَالْقِطَارُ مُرِيحٌ.
sentences.translation: Putovanje traje oko devet sati, a voz je udoban.
sentences.translationEn: The journey takes about nine hours and the train is comfortable.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسْتُ بِجَانِبِ النَّافِذَةِ وَتَأَمَّلْتُ الْمَنَاظِرَ الْجَمِيلَةَ.
sentences.translation: Sjeo sam pored prozora i posmatrao lijepe prizore.
sentences.translationEn: I sat by the window and admired the beautiful scenery.

sentences.arabic: تَحَدَّثْتُ مَعَ رَجُلٍ مِصْرِيٍّ جَالِسٍ بِجَانِبِي وَتَعَلَّمْتُ مِنْهُ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Razgovarao sam s Egipćaninom koji je sjedio pored mene i od njega mnogo naučio.
sentences.translationEn: I chatted with an Egyptian man sitting next to me and learned a lot from him.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلْنَا إِلَى الْأَقْصُرِ مَعَ غُرُوبِ الشَّمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Stigli smo u Luksor pri zalasku sunca.
sentences.translationEn: We arrived in Luxor at sunset.
